creator: gallasch@free.de
text:
Booting the DL145 G3 with disabled ehci in GENERIC kernel changes =
nothing, the boot process still times out with
"mount waiting for: usbus1 usbus0"

I've bee debugging this for 2-3 weeks now and now have decided to stick =
with 8-STABLE on this particular server.
My impression is, that the BIOS on the DL145 G3 is broken in combination =
with FreeBSD9.

Regards,
Kai Gallasch.
